---
title: "Prairie-Vole-Range-Interaction"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
```



```{r}
HD_Range <- "data/HR_Notreduced_H.csv"

HD_Range <- read_csv(HD_Range, col_names = TRUE)

HD_Range <- HD_Range |>
  rename(tag_id = "HEX Tag ID",
         x = "X Coor",
         y = "Y Coor")


LD_Range <- "data/HR_Notreduced_L.csv"

LD_Range <- read_csv(LD_Range, col_names = TRUE)

LD_Range <- LD_Range |>
  rename(tag_id = "HEX Tag ID",
         x = "X Coor",
         y = "Y Coor")
```



```{r}
HD_Range$short_tag <- substr(HD_Range$tag_id, nchar(HD_Range$tag_id) -1, nchar(HD_Range$tag_id))

pointsH <- st_as_sf(HD_Range, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = NA)

Ranges_H <- HD_Range |> 
  distinct(tag_id, short_tag, x, y, ) |>
  group_by(tag_id, short_tag) |>
  filter(n() >=3) |>
  summarise(
    geometry = st_combine(st_as_sf(
      tibble(x, y), coords = c("x", "y"), crs = NA)$geometry) |>
        st_convex_hull(), .groups= "drop"
    ) |>
      st_as_sf()
  

Ranges_H$area_m2 <- as.numeric(st_area(Ranges_H))


LD_Range$short_tag <- substr(LD_Range$tag_id, nchar(LD_Range$tag_id) -1, nchar(LD_Range$tag_id))

pointsL <- st_as_sf(LD_Range, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = NA)

Ranges_L <- LD_Range |> 
  distinct(tag_id, short_tag, x, y, ) |>
  group_by(tag_id, short_tag) |>
  filter(n() >=3) |>
  summarise(
    geometry = st_combine(st_as_sf(
      tibble(x, y), coords = c("x", "y"), crs = NA)$geometry) |>
        st_convex_hull(), .groups= "drop"
    ) |>
      st_as_sf()
  

Ranges_L$area_m2 <- as.numeric(st_area(Ranges_L))

```



```{r}
pointsH$short_tag <- HD_Range$short_tag[match(pointsH$short_tag, HD_Range$short_tag)]


H_plot_all <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = Ranges_H, aes(fill = short_tag, color = short_tag), alpha = 0.18, linewidth = .4) +
  geom_sf(data = pointsH, aes(color = short_tag), size = 0.6, alpha = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3, override.aes = list(alpha=0.6)), color="none")
H_plot_all

###

pointsL$short_tag <- LD_Range$short_tag[match(pointsL$short_tag, LD_Range$short_tag)]

L_plot_all <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = Ranges_L, aes(fill = short_tag, color = short_tag), alpha = 0.18, linewidth = .4) +
  geom_sf(data = pointsL, aes(color = short_tag), size = 0.6, alpha = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3, override.aes = list(alpha=0.6)), color="none") 

L_plot_all
```



```{r}
H_plot_facet <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = Ranges_H, aes(fill = short_tag, color = short_tag), alpha = 0.18, linewidth = .4) +
  geom_sf(data = pointsH, aes(color = short_tag), size = 0.6, alpha = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3, override.aes = list(alpha=0.6)), color="none") +
  facet_wrap(~short_tag, ncol = 7)

H_plot_facet

###

L_plot_facet <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = Ranges_L, aes(fill = short_tag, color = short_tag), alpha = 0.18, linewidth = .4) +
  geom_sf(data = pointsL, aes(color = short_tag), size = 0.6, alpha = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3, override.aes = list(alpha=0.6)), color="none") +
  facet_wrap(~short_tag, ncol = 7)

L_plot_facet
```
